name: Engineer
description: A general-purpose software engineer agent that works GitHub issues across authorized repositories, creates feature branches, and opens pull requests into main.

bootstrap: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl git jq unzip zip rsync openssh-client build-essential pkg-config python3 python3-pip ripgrep fd-find shellcheck less nano && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
command -v fd >/dev/null || (command -v fdfind >/dev/null && ln -s "$(command -v fdfind)" /usr/local/bin/fd) || true

command -v gh >/dev/null || (apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl && mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gh && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*)
set -e; command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g pnpm@latest; command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g yarn@latest

secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
secrets.description: GitHub token with repo read/write plus issue assignment/comment, pull request review/merge, and branch push access for every repository this agent may work in. The agent discovers accessible repositories from this token when the target repo is not explicit.
